2603.22999.title: PaperVoyager : Building Interactive Web with Visual Language Models
2603.22999.paper_summary: Recent advances in visual language models have enabled autonomous agents for complex reasoning, tool use, and document understanding. However, existing document agents mainly transform papers into static artifacts such as summaries, webpages, or slides, which are insufficient for technical papers involving dynamic mechanisms and state transitions. In this work, we propose a Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent that converts research papers into executable interactive web systems. Given a PDF paper, the agent performs end-to-end processing without human intervention, including paper understanding, system modeling, and interactive webpage synthesis, enabling users to manipulate inputs and observe dynamic behaviors. To evaluate this task, we introduce a benchmark of 19 research papers paired with expert-built interactive systems as ground truth. We further propose PaperVoyager, a structured generation framework that explicitly models mechanisms and interaction logic during synthesis. Experiments show that PaperVoyager significantly improves the quality of generated interactive systems, offering a new paradigm for interactive scientific paper understanding.
2603.22999.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視覺語言模型方面的進展使得自主代理能夠進行複雜的推理、工具使用和文件理解。<lb/>然而，現有的文件代理主要將論文轉換為靜態的工件，如摘要、網頁或幻燈片，這對於涉及動態機制和狀態轉換的技術論文來說是不夠的。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了一個論文到互動系統代理，它將研究論文轉換為可執行的互動網頁系統。<lb/>給定一篇PDF論文，該代理進行端到端的處理，無需人類干預，包括論文理解、系統建模和互動網頁合成，使得用戶能夠操控輸入並觀察動態行為。<lb/>為了評估這項任務，我們引入了一個包含19篇研究論文的基準，這些論文與專家構建的互動系統配對作為真實標準。<lb/>我們進一步提出了PaperVoyager，一個結構化生成框架，在合成過程中明確建模機制和互動邏輯。<lb/>實驗表明，PaperVoyager顯著提高了生成的互動系統的質量，為互動科學論文理解提供了一種新範式。
2603.22999.author: Dasen Dai et.al.
2603.22999.authors: Dasen Dai, Biao Wu, Meng Fang, Wenhao Wang
